race.comment: SHE'S ASSORT (8) lightly raced filly heading in the right direction. Scored a comprehensive Maiden victory first-up at Kembla Grange, then used up early from the wide barrier with a fading last as fav over 1000m at Wyong. Can take control early from the good gate and prove hard to run down. FIERCE (1) was chasing his third-straight victory when coming to town with a close-up fourth over 1100m at Rosehill in BM72 class. Regular rider sticks and shapes as the main danger in his right class. ZING TO ME (7) rewarded for her consistency at start nine when she rounded them up effortlessly to score with plenty in hand over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Desperate for a firmer surface and shapes as a solid top-three contender. TRUMPER (6) resumes after he scored a slick first-up victory over this track and trip last November. Struggled in two runs since and fitted with the one 850m trial.
